term: wreck the best thing that ever happened to you
pronunciation: /rɛk ðə bɛst θɪŋ ðæt ˈɛvər ˈhæpənd tə juː/
englishDefinitions: to ruin an important good opportunity, relationship, or positive situation
to damage something very valuable in your life
persianTranslation: بهترین چیزی را که تا به حال برایت اتفاق افتاده خراب کردن
فرصت/رابطه خیلی خوب را نابود کردن
examples: Don't wreck the best thing that ever happened to you by lying.
He knew he might wreck the best thing that ever happened to him.
One bad decision can wreck the best thing that ever happened to you.
